source_excerpt: The current local evidence names a multi-cave Galician context rather than one site, so the row stays refused from point mapping.
We sampled 18 cattle subfossils from different ages and different mountain caves in Galicia, of which 11 were subject to sequencing of the mitochondrial genome and phylogenetic analysis.
The current local evidence names a multi-cave Galician context rather than one site, so the row stays refused from point mapping.
